questions.q1: Why do some people not want to be famous?
questions.q2: Why is it sometimes difficult being famous?
questions.q3: What are some of the advantages of being famous?
questions.q4: Why is personal privacy so important to some people?
questions.q5: Can famous people expect to keep their private lives secret?
questions.q6: How are family members of famous people affected by their fame?
questions.q7: Why do some people dislike the gossip magazines in Hong Kong?
questions.q8: Do the public have the right to know about the private lives of famous people?
questions.q9: Why is freedom of expression important for the media?
questions.q10: Are there any types of stories which gossip magazines should not publish?

questions.q1: What do you think of teenagers who have tattoos and body piercing?
questions.q2: Why do teenagers think body art is 'cool?'
questions.q3: Do any of your friends have tattoos and body piercing?
questions.q4: Have you ever thought about having a tattoo or body piercing?
questions.q5: Why is it important for teenagers to express their individuality?
questions.q6: How do adults and parents feel about teenagers who have body modifications?
questions.q7: Do teenagers go too far with body modifications these days?
questions.q8: What do you think are the long term problems of having a tattoo?
questions.q9: What other ways do young people try to 'stand out' from the crowd?
questions.q10: What advice would you give to a friend who wanted a tattoo or some kind of body-piercing?

questions.q1: Do you have any friends or family members who work too hard?
questions.q2: What are some of the disadvantages of working on Saturday and Sunday?
questions.q3: Do you think young people now work harder than their parents did in the past?
questions.q4: How do you think children are affected by parents who work long hours?
questions.q5: How can children in Hong Kong help parents who have to work long hours?
questions.q6: How much do you believe success depends on hard work?
questions.q7: How might a workplace be disadvantaged by having workaholics on its staff?
questions.q8: Why do you think work addiction is known as the 'respectable addiction' in the USA?
questions.q9: Why do you think some people enjoy working so much?
questions.q10: Some people live to work and others work to live. Can you tell us which kind of person you think you are and why?

questions.q1: What do teenagers buy that they do not need?
questions.q2: What should children spend their money on?
questions.q3: What new things do teens all want to have?
questions.q4: How can parents teach their children not to become so materialistic?
questions.q5: Why do young people want to buy brand name products?
questions.q6: What problems can result from becoming too materialistic?
questions.q7: Why do some parents give in to their children's demands?
questions.q8: How can teenagers develop more self-control over their spending?

questions.q1: What kind of summer part-time job would you like?
questions.q2: What kind of job would be a dream job for you?
questions.q3: What kind of things do students who have a part-time job spend their money on?
questions.q4: Do you think students should do part-time jobs during the summer?
questions.q5: What skills can students learn from doing part-time jobs that they can't learn at school?
questions.q6: Do you think part-time jobs affect school work?
questions.q7: What should you do in order to be successful in a job interview?
questions.q8: What kinds of part-time jobs should secondary school students avoid?

questions.q1: What do you think aliens would look like?
questions.q2: Do you enjoy watching movies about aliens?
questions.q3: Would you believe someone if they said they had met an alien?
questions.q4: What information about human beings do you think might be useful for aliens to learn?
questions.q5: Is it worth spending money on trying to locate alien life in the universe?
questions.q6: If there are no aliens, why do so many people claim to have met them?
questions.q7: If there were aliens, what would they think about human life on earth?
questions.q8: What positive outcomes could result from learning about alien culture?
